title: 2025 Memorandum - Earthquake Exposure Data

sections.full_text:
- Earthquake Exposure Data Return
To:
Chief Executive Officers and Chief Agents, Federally Regulated Canadian and branches of Foreign Property and Casualty Insurance Companies
From:
Andrew Miller Chief Data Officer
Companies are reminded that they are required to file the Earthquake Data Form with OSFI for the reporting year 2025, by May 31, 2025.
The data must be submitted via the Regulatory Reporting System (RRS). There are two options within RRS, made available within your Draft Returns RRS folder starting as at April 1, 2025:
  - The online web form for direct data input and submission; or
  - Alternatively, institutions can submit this data by uploading an XML file to RRS. Technical specifications for the format and structure of this data file are available for download in RRS under Documents / Portal Documents / English / Return Technical Specifications.
Minor changes made to the Earthquake Exposure Data Form and Instruction this year:

content.text: Chief Executive Officers and Chief Agents, Federally Regulated Canadian and branches of Foreign Property and Casualty Insurance Companies
Companies are reminded that they are required to file the Earthquake Data Form with OSFI for the reporting year 2025, by May 31, 2025.
The data must be submitted via the Regulatory Reporting System (RRS). There are two options within RRS, made available within your Draft Returns RRS folder starting as at April 1, 2025:

items: The online web form for direct data input and submission; or

Alternatively, institutions can submit this data by uploading an XML file to RRS. Technical specifications for the format and structure of this data file are available for download in RRS under Documents / Portal Documents / English / Return Technical Specifications.

content.text: Minor changes made to the Earthquake Exposure Data Form and Instruction this year:

sections.heading: Section 2.1
sections.full_text: 1. Field 2145 “Exchange rate applied to capital & surplus (Canadian branches only)” is coded as a number with five decimal places.

items: Field 2145 “Exchange rate applied to capital & surplus (Canadian branches only)” is coded as a number with five decimal places.

sections.heading: Section 3.1
sections.full_text:
1. Replaced “RMS” with “Moody’s RMS”
Questions concerning the Earthquake Exposure Data Form should be addressed to your OSFI Lead Supervisor or to David Lim, Actuarial Division, by email at david.lim@osfi-bsif.gc.ca. For questions concerning electronic filing of this data in RRS, please email Returns Administration at RRSsupport-SDRsoutien@osfi-bsif.gc.ca.
